title: nasturtium subulatum
intro: Nasturtium subulatum, also known as the lesser cress or dwarf cress, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, round leaves and delicate white flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium subulatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Nasturtium subulatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
